leadText: If you were looking for the item in Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver, see Shiny Leaf. The Gold Leaf (Japanese: きんのはっぱ Gold Leaf) is a valuable item introduced in Generation II.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Gold Leaf serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C A strange, gold-colored leaf. P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A mysterious gold leaf. No trees with this leaf have been found yet.

Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods G S C Held by wild Raichu , wild Parasect , wild Venomoth , wild Golduck , wild Primeape , wild Slowbro , wild Dewgong , wild Muk , wild Hypno , wild Marowak , wild Rhydon , and wild Seadra from Generation I P E Gift from Partner Pikachu P or Eevee E
